1010101010110010001111101101111100010000001100110011100111000101001001 - ASI: 29

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 00 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  0001 = 0 * 001
  1000 = 10 * 00
  1001 = 1 * 001
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1011 = 10 * 11
  00100 = 001 * 00
  01001 = 0 * 1001
  01111 = 011 * 11
  10011 = 10 * 011
  10000001 = 1000 * 0001
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  011111000 = 01111 * 1000
  011111011 = 01111 * 1011
  100110011 = 1001 * 10011
  100111000 = 10011 * 1000
  101001001 = 1010 * 01001
  101100100 = 1011 * 00100
  10000001100110011 = 10000001 * 100110011
  10101010101100100 = 10101010 * 101100100
  011111011011111000 = 011111011 * 011111000
  100111000101001001 = 100111000 * 101001001
  10000001100110011100111000101001001 = 10000001100110011 * 100111000101001001
  10101010101100100011111011011111000 = 10101010101100100 * 011111011011111000
  1010101010110010001111101101111100010000001100110011100111000101001001 = 10101010101100100011111011011111000 * 10000001100110011100111000101001001
